Write the voice-over as a continuous, chronological story.

Rules:
- Follow the timestamps strictly. Never describe a later moment before an earlier one.
- Ground every claim in the digest. If the digest does not say a train is present, do not put one there.
- Name stations only when the on-screen text names them.
- Vary the language; do not repeat the same sentence shape.
- Write one section per title card, in order. Begin each section with a markdown heading naming that line exactly, e.g. '## Bakerloo Line'. Mention the timestamp of at least one moment in each section as m:ss.
- No preamble, no closing commentary. Begin with the first heading.
response:
## Bakerloo Line
We begin our journey at 0:09 at Embankment, where the rhythmic pulse of the city starts to take hold. A woman makes her way along the platform, passing a crowd of commuters in the subterranean dimness. By 1:08, the silence is broken as a train pulls into the station, bringing a fresh wave of passengers to Castle.

## Central Line
Moving on to the Central Line, we find ourselves at Bethnal Green at 2:21. Shortly after, the distant hum grows into a roar as a train descends the tracks, gliding into the station to meet those waiting on the platform.

## Circle Line
At 4:41, the signage marks our arrival at Temple. The scene shifts to the tracks, where a train is seen pulling passengers through the heart of the network.

## District Line
By 5:52, we have reached Stepney Green. For several minutes, the footage captures the steady flow of the District Line, showing a train pulling into the station amidst a dense throng of travelers.

## Hammersmith City Line
Returning once more to Stepney Green at 8:57, we transition to the Hammersmith City Line. A train arrives, collecting its passengers and continuing its journey through the city's arteries.

## Jubilee Line
At 10:13, we stop at Cottage. The pace slows as we observe a subway train standing still at the station, a momentary pause in the urban rush.

## Metropolitan Line
We arrive at Finchley Road at 12:26. On the southbound platform, the Metropolitan Line is in full swing, with trains pulling in to accommodate a vast multitude of passengers.

## Northern Line
At 15:00, a sign on the wall marks our entry into the Northern Line. At Charing Cross, the camera lingers on a man sitting on the station floor, before the view shifts at 17:01 to a train accelerating through the darkness of a tunnel.

## Piccadilly Line
The journey continues at 17:15 at Finsbury Park. From there, we follow the line toward Walthamstow Central, where trains pull in to serve a diverse and crowded platform.

## Victoria Line
At 19:47, we pass the sign for Blackhorse Road. The footage captures a subway train held at a standstill, waiting for the signal to proceed.

## Waterloo City Line
Our final stop begins at 21:44 at Waterloo. Under the broad banner of the Underground, a man in a suit stands in quiet anticipation, waiting for the arrival of his train.
